title: nasturtium sinapis
intro: Nasturtium sinapis, also known as Indian cress or common cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of nasturtium sinapis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of nasturtium sinapis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and skin problems.
